Comment: fix static export bucket to ch7-static and re-export governor-results-dev

commands:
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && python3 - <<"PY"
from pathlib import Path
import re
path = Path(".env")
text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
updates = {
    "STATIC_RESULTS_S3_BUCKET": "ch7-static-bkkelection2569",
    "STATIC_RESULTS_S3_REGION": "ap-southeast-1",
    "STATIC_RESULTS_PREFIX": "api-data/governor-results-dev",
    "GOVERNOR_RESULTS_PREFIX": "api-data/governor-results-dev",
    "RESULTS_API_STATIC_RESULTS_PREFIX": "api-data/governor-results-dev",
    "RESULTS_API_DEFAULT_DATA_MODE": "latest_snapshot",
}
for key, value in updates.items():
    line = f"{key}={value}"
    if re.search(rf"^{re.escape(key)}=.*$", text, flags=re.M):
        text = re.sub(rf"^{re.escape(key)}=.*$", line, text, flags=re.M)
    else:
        if not text.endswith("\n"):
            text += "\n"
        text += line + "\n"
path.write_text(text, encoding="utf-8")
for key in updates:
    print(re.search(rf"^{re.escape(key)}=.*$", text, flags=re.M).group(0))
PY'
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && docker compose --env-file .env up -d --no-deps --build line-relay results-api'

sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && docker compose exec -T line-relay python - <<"PY"
from hermes.supervisor.services.static_results_export import export_static_governor_results
print(export_static_governor_results())
PY'
